name: Tuna and Olive
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the minced onion and cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally until softened.
3. Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 15 seconds, being careful not to burn it.
4. Pour in the jar marinara sauce and bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in the sliced Greek olives and oil-packed tuna until well combined.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet and toss everything together until evenly coated.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
